Transcript: Good day. This is an important product safety recall. Notice from Costco wholesale. Please note that between August and December of 2005, you may have purchased a set of white outdoor led Christmas lights, Costco item number five zero one seven zero one. Or instead of blue outdoor led Christmas lights, Costco item number five zero one seven zero two. Both manufactured by universal life, both lights that were sold in packs of three boxes. There have been some incidents of electrical malfunction with this item immediately unplug and remove these lights and return them to Costco for a full refund. If he gave these lights to someone as a gift, please ask them to immediately return them to us for a full refund, no other lights that are effected by this recall for further information, please call Costco at one.
